If you're open to it, we would welcome the chance to discuss your feedback further. Please reach out to Cathie Wright, Firm Administrator directly at (518)459-2100 and we’ll do our best to address your concerns.

reviews.text: My experience with Pierro, Connor and Strauss has been everything that they advertise. I have been working with attorney Frank Hemming on and off since December 2016 on behalf of my elderly mother. Frank was instrumental in getting my mother home healthcare aide services through the NYS CDPAP program back then. I hadn’t the need to contact him again until July of 2023 when my mother’s health began to decline, and she needed additional home healthcare aide services. Once again, he came through for us and helped her receive the additional hours that she needed. More recently, he helped set up both a pooled trust and a revocable trust for my mother’s estate. I really enjoy working with Frank and his team. I find him to be professional, knowledgeable, personable, and great at what he does. I would also like to give special thanks to Megan Kalisz and April Brickle-Griesemer. I appreciate everything each of them has done to help us. Kudos to the law firm of Pierro, Connor and Strauss and especially Frank Hemming!
reviews.ownerResponse: Andrew, thank you so much for sharing this positive feedback! We're glad to know that Frank Hemming has provided legal counsel on several occasions that helped your mother obtain home care and the documents needed for her long-term care and estate plan. It means a lot to hear that you found Frank knowledgeable and personable (we agree!) and enjoyed working with April and Megan. Should the need arise, we'll look forward to serving you and your family again.

reviews.text:

We would highly recommend their services.

reviews.text: Andrew has been amazing from the start. We had 2 complex cases. i would highly recommend him. We have completed my daughter case and currently resolving my sons case. These are very complex cases and have been handled very well. and pricing has been more than fair. Thank you

When many other attorneys felt my case wasn't worth their time or energy Andrew stepped up without hesitation.
My situation made all the more difficult as I now live overseas making online meeting times all the more difficult.
It has been a seemingly endless and almost hopeless process fighting my ex-wife's lawyers ( 3 different law firms, 3 different lawyers in the last firm) who were not afraid to bend if not even break the law prior to Andrew's involvement.  Andrew, through thoughtful negotiation worked out a settlement that I can work with and had not seemed possible before.
I hope this will be the last chapter of what has now been a 16 year process. I will not hesitate to retain Andrew again in the future if it  becomes necessary.

I don’t normally leave reviews, but thanking someone personally for helping you through one of the most difficult times in your life doesn’t seem enough.

I consulted with a few attorneys in my area before meeting with Andrew. He presents with a friendly, calm and confident demeanor that puts you at ease right away. He answered my questions, explained options and potential next steps. I left his office feeling relieved that I had found the attorney to represent me.

Andrew and his staff communicated with me when necessary and answered any questions that I or my advocates had throughout the process. I never felt judged for showing emotions or when needing information explained differently. There was no pressure to settle a particular way and that he was fully capable and confident to go to trial. In the end, we came up with an agreement I felt was fair and allowed me the ability to move onto the next chapter of my life.

If you are seeking representation and want someone who not only has the credentials, knowledge, and skills, but shows empathy, kindness, and confidence, I recommend meeting with Andrew and his team.

I met Andrew at a bar in Albany just one time & thought to myself at the time : "Well, here's a guy I wouldn't mind having a beer with every now & then !"

Little did I know that in less than 2 years' time, I would be scuffing the steps up to his Office for my Separation Decree & Custody Agreement. Andrew was extremely helpful, took his time to explain my options, answered all my questions -- & strange as it may sound -- I think he way Under-Billed me !!! A lawyer that under-bills . . . ?!! Now, that's a first.

He got me through a very tough time -- & all in a very humane, validating & intelligent way -- & he got me what I required to have a serene & painless legal separation.

Well, guess what ? Tough [Legal] times come back -- & you need a lawyer like Andrew who has your back . . . 4 years after I thought we were all done, my child's mother threw me a curved ball -- & I was back in Andrew's office.

Astonishingly, Andrew remembered details of my case with great accuracy ( including my child's name etc. ) and I just felt so comfortable with him after that, there was NO QUESTION IN MY MIND  that I was going to Retain him again.

We are in the midst of a Custody Battle -- which I am sure we will win -- because I have Andrew Wood, Esq. in my corner !!

Your prayers will also help -- so please pray for me.

I cannot recommend Andrew Wood enough for a Divorce.  After our first meeting, I immediately knew  Andrew was the perfect person for my case.

Andrew always explained everything to me from beginning to end. As you can imagine, the divorce was emotional and difficult but Andrew was so compassionate and understanding.  I had to share information with him that I’ve never told anyone and I never felt judged or embarrassed.

I should add that the divorce was incredibly complex and involved a business that in the end I ended up getting because Andrew handled it amazingly.

Honestly, he went above and beyond. He always asked me how  the kids were doing and I could see he genuinely cared and was concerned.

Some attorneys really up-charge their fees, but not Andrew. He was worth EVERY SINGLE CENT. I recommend him to every person who asks!

I would highly recommend Andrew Wood as a divorce attorney.  During my divorce and child custody proceedings, Andrew was always available for me and kept me calm and focused during a most difficult time in my life.  He and his staff are efficient and go out of their way to answer questions and go over details. He treated me like a friend not a client.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your wonderful review of our firm! It was a pleasure assisting you in this difficult time. Any time you need anything, just call. We are always here for our clients.

I would, and have already, recommend Kevin as an attorney that stands beside his clients and stands for justice.

After leaving my appointment with Mr. Luibrand I became more skeptical about Albany  County Executors Office and wonder if the meeting was set up just to find out how much I really knew about what is going on in the cover up. We cannot recommend Kevin and his law firm highly enough. We were involved in a bizarre and ugly situation, with an unexpected criminal arrest of my husband by the defendants on a Sunday evening; Kevin was at all times available by cell phone and messaging. His experience in both civil and criminal law was evident throughout the months it took to resolve our legal situation, from generation of a civil suit to discovery to court appearances to settlement agreement. At a time when no city agency would help us, and very few individuals even believed us with regard to what was going on, Kevin did both; he suggested and explained strategies and acted with empathy and understanding toward us throughout. We had complete confidence in his advice and direction, and his efforts led to dismissal of the criminal charges and as a result settlement of the civil suit in our favor. During this time, we interacted with almost every member of his staff, including his co-counsel, and each was patient, efficient, and unfailingly kind. Kevin is someone who takes seriously the trust a client places in him, and proceeds from a basis of what is right, not what is merely acceptable. We would give him 10 stars if possible.
From the first call to the final and excellent result, we were in great hands! Thank you Kevin and all of your staff at Luibrand Law. We celebrated last night thanks to you!

I cannot say enough great things about Joe Granich. From the very first time I spoke with him, I knew I was in good hands. I was going through a very stressful legal situation and felt overwhelmed and anxious about what might happen. Joe immediately put me at ease. He was calm, confident, and extremely knowledgeable, and he took the time to really listen to me and understand the situation instead of rushing me off the phone like some attorneys do.

What stood out right away was how smart and strategic he is. He clearly knows the law inside and out and explained everything to me in a way that made sense. He walked me through the process step by step so I always knew what to expect. Any time I had questions or concerns, he responded quickly and made sure I felt informed and supported. That level of communication meant a lot during such an anxious time.

When it came time for court, Joe was completely prepared and handled everything with confidence and professionalism. Watching him work made it obvious that he truly knows what he is doing. Thanks to his skill, preparation, and experience, I only had to appear in court one time and the entire case was resolved that same day. What felt like a huge weight on my shoulders for weeks was suddenly over and done with, and I truly believe that outcome was because of Joe’s ability and dedication.

Joe is not only an excellent attorney, but he is also someone who genuinely cares about his clients. He understood how stressful the situation was for me and did everything he could to ease my anxiety and make the process as smooth as possible. That combination of intelligence, professionalism, and compassion is rare.

Subject:

John Musacchio  ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I spent several days contemplating how I could write this review fairly and commending John for his services. After a death in my family, I was immediately thrown into a real estate situation which overwhelmed me to the point of helplessness. I was referred to John by a town employee who was familiar with the property involved. After a reassuring phone conversation with John, I submitted a retainer to secure his needed help. John provided me with professional advise and referrals as needed to deal with many problems such as: hazmat contractors, town negotiations and documents, real estate agents, town hearings, property water, sewer and inspection concerns, estate finances, personal property and expenses, and many more. John had a great understanding of my emotional involvement with this nightmare and provided me with calm professional guidance and support from start to finish. He has a God given gift to uplift his client even when things look impossible. Thank you John for guiding me through this mission. I could not have done it alone. As we are nearing the finish line with this stressful situation, those reading this review need to know that I now consider John Musacchio to be a very good friend.

Extremely disappointing experience. I retained this firm for a time-sensitive family court matter involving repeated obstruction of my court-ordered parenting time. From the outset I provided extensive, dated documentation (AppClose logs, screenshots of missed/blocked calls, and messages) showing multiple missed visits and interference.

Despite clear evidence and repeated requests for action, no motion was ever filed on my behalf during the months I was represented. I was repeatedly told the case was being handled, but in fact nothing was submitted to the court. Because of this inaction multiple visits were lost and I incurred over $2,000 in out-of-pocket expenses when a family member had to fly in to supervise a single visit.

Communication from the firm was inadequate: messages were delayed or unanswered, and I was not informed of the lack of filings until after I retained new counsel. My new attorney identified that the necessary court steps had not been taken and immediately filed to address the issue.

If you need active, timely representation in a high-conflict family matter, look elsewhere. I cannot recommend this firm based on my experience.

reviews.text:
Leslie Silva, Esq. is a quintessential professional. She is the most prepared attorney I have ever had the pleasure of working with. She is quick, smart and honest. Leslie knows the law, she knows how to prepare and she knows how to argue a case in court. Having very young children when my divorce started way back in 2007, there have, unfortunately, been a couple of times throughout the past 17 years that disagreements found their way to the court. In those early years, I have had the unfortunate experiences of being both
a petitioner and a defendant, and used family law attorneys available to me, in those early years. It is never easy and never fun. I have also had my fair share of seeing the inside of a family court room and had hoped never to see the inside of one again. Fate had different plans; and 17 years later, I found myself needing a family attorney one last time. It was a complicated situation, which included a non traditional divorce agreement pertaining to the children, and was late in the post divorce. Leslie was recommended by someone I knew, who was also an attorney, but in a different field. I was hesitant to move forward with a petition, and was paralyzed with anxiety. It was a stressful time for me, but Leslie was amazing… Strong, smart, and confidant. She made everything feel like, no matter what, it was going to be okay. She worked hard from the very first day of filing the petition through court appearances, and required court memorandums of law, etc; it was months of hard work and dedication to the complicated case.  And when the last day, of many months, finally came: Oral arguments in court; Leslie was a rock star. I was amazed. She was so poised, so prepared, so well spoken. She hit it out of the ball park. Leslie’s written and oral skill, knowledge of the law and preparation won my kids what they needed. She is quite literally, the most skilled attorney I have ever seen in the court. I, and my children, will be forever grateful! Thank you Leslie Silva. You were truly amazing.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review. We greatly appreciate your business.

reviews.text: Tori Lupia & her team at Pitta & Baione worked really hard with me. Proving my employment from 2001 made me believe this was impossible. Their hard work finally paid off & they got me enrolled into the world trade center health program. I was ready to give up with this pursuit & except my fate.  Working at, near & storing items from the World Trade Center I got diagnosed with a rare blood cancer with no cure. My heart & spirits have been lifted having a program to help me with my medical expenses.  Thank you Tori & your team at Pitta & Baione
reviews.ownerResponse:

Your perseverance and strength are truly inspiring, and we are honored to have played a part in lifting your spirits and helping with your medical expenses. The Pitta & Baione LLP Team

After researching, calling and talking to about 10 different lawyers, my husband and I decided to meet Brian for the free consultation he offered. I explained my situation to him, he asked some clarifying questions and then proceed to tell my husband and I how we can proceed with our case. He went over the pros and cons, best case and worse case scenarios which was super helpful. I really felt at ease with Brian. By the time we had our second meeting with him, I began to realize that he is genuine, he is not money driven, he really do care about what happens to me which is less that I can say for many of the lawyers I came across. He has an amazing understanding of the immigration process. At each step of the filing process, we knew what to expect because Brian kept us in the loop. After much back and forth, I was pretty much denied twice, because of proofs of documentation that uscis requested that I did not have. Brian never backed down, He dug deeper, he did his research and came up with all that he could to repute the denial letters and other request. A year and a half later, I was finally granted my green card. My future and the future of my family is so much brighter today because of Brian. I am now looking forward to travel back to my country of birth for the first time in over 20 year! I have already recommended Brian to friends who he already helped to get their green card. I had a malpractice case back in 2001 handled by Eugene Spada. I was 10 years old at the time. I remember sitting in the courtroom for weeks, while still suffering from horrible pain due to my Crohn's disease. He had brought a case upon doctors from the former hospital St. Claire's, who had admitted and treated me for 28 days in 1998 and had performed multiple unnecessary surgeries on what they thought was a condition I did not have. Mr. Spada had included many providers of care from that period in my life. One specifically who had absolutely nothing to do with the pain and suffering I had endured. I had to testify myself on the stand at that young age. The jury was in awe of the neglect on the part of the doctors and surgeons from the hospital as well as my primary care doctor at that time. Needless to say, we all thought I would succeed in winning this case. I remember something specific Mr. Spada told me personally in the elevator on the way up to hear the deliberation. "You will never have to worry about another thing in your life". The verdict was not guilty. We lost. Because the doctors and practices were tried as a whole, the jury could not convict the provider who did not have a hand in my mistreatment. A juror told my mother, "we wanted to find in your favor, so badly, we couldn't in good conscience find that specific provider caused neglect". Mr. Spada got greedy, and as a result, I did not get the justice I deserved from this incident. I WOULD NEVER REFER ANYONE TO HIM AS A LAWYER. He cares more about what the outcome could provide him, than what the client deserved in terms of justice, not even monetarily. It was a traumatizing experience I will never forget. I'm surprised to see he is even still practicing. Please, think carefully before asking him to take your case.

reviews.text:
I cannot express enough gratitude for the incredible legal representation provided by James C. Knox and his dedicated team at Hacker Murphy, LLP. Facing two felony charges, I endured a grueling four-month ordeal that felt like an absolute nightmare. Throughout the entire process, Mr. Knox and his team remained steadfast in their advocacy, ensuring the best possible outcome for me.

From the very beginning, Julie Nociolo played a crucial role in securing my release at the arraignment. Standing in for Mr. Knox, she skillfully and successfully argued against the A.D.A. Her ability to navigate the courtroom dynamics with confidence and precision was truly commendable.

Through their expertise and commitment, Mr. Knox and his team not only negotiated a plea that effectively dismissed my charges and sealed any record of this situation going forward, but they also secured a resolution with no jail time, no penalties, and no fines—a result I never imagined possible.

Mr. Knox’s professionalism, knowledge, and relentless dedication were evident at every stage. He fought vigorously to protect my rights, keeping me informed, reassured, and prepared every step of the way. Thanks to him and his team, I was able to move forward from this difficult chapter with minimal long-term consequences.

If you need a defense attorney who will stand by you with unwavering commitment, legal acumen, and a compassionate approach, James C. Knox and his team at Hacker Murphy, LLP are the ones to trust. Their expertise and devotion to justice make them truly exceptional advocates.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience, Christine. We're thrilled to hear about the positive impact that James C. Knox and the team at Hacker Murphy, LLP had on your case. It's wonderful to know that Julie's advocacy and the team's dedication helped secure such a favorable outcome for you. Your trust in our services means a lot to us, and we are committed to providing the best support to all our clients. We appreciate your recommendation and wish you all the best in your future endeavors.

Our first attorney suggested we contact Matt Hug for help with Objections to a Support Order written by a Family Court Magistrate.  We did so, and sent Matt over 1000 pages of Court documents.  Despite having just 2 weeks to spool up to what had transpired in our Court case, Matt wrote a stellar Objection document.  We thought, "no way the Judge could read it and uphold the errors of the Magistrate."  And, we were right!  The Judge overruled the Magistrate’s Order, held the offending party accountable for her willful violations, and even ordered her to pay counsel fees.  Later, at a hearing regarding said counsel fees, Matt Hug proved a worthy attorney and we were very glad to be represented by him.

My wife was severely injured in a traffic crash when a distracted driver disregarded a traffic control device, leaving her with permanent physical disabilities. I interviewed several Capitol District attorneys, but Don Boyajian stood out as being the most experienced and highly respected among them all. I was fortunate that he accepted our case. The entire process was handled with a level of professionalism and expertise that exceeded all my expectations and hopes. He achieved a very favorable outcome that enabled my wife to improve her quality of life and achieve some level of independence despite significant mobility impairments. A couple years later I had the misfortune to cross paths with an aggressive reckless driver who crashed into my SUV after losing control of his vehicle. The crash left me with some serious injuries. Mr. Boyajian kindly agreed to handle my case. If you are seeking representation for a potential personal injury claim, I wholeheartedly recommend Mr. Donald Boyajian and his team.
If you would like your personal injury suit to take longer than it does to get a law degree, this is the firm for you.

reviews.text: My wife and I were involved in an automobile/pedestrian accident where we were struck from behind while walking our dog in broad daylight.   I called Don the next day and he personally met me at the accident sight to review the incident and take detailed notes and photos.  My wife was in intensive care and I was not sure what to do next having never experienced anything like this before.  Don assured me that he and his team would take good care of us and to just focus on caring for my wife and myself.  It was very comforting to know someone was now "in our corner".   The "big" insurance company immediately made us a low ball offer which Don refused and insured us that what we were going through and continue to go through, was worth much more than what the insurance company thought.  Many times during the months ahead we questioned if we were making the right decisions, but throughout,  Don remained calm and confident that we were in fact going to get everything that we deserved from this life changing event.  The insurance company continued for months playing games with more low offers, scheduling doctor visits and depositions before ultimately cancelling each and every one the day before or the day of the scheduled meeting.  In the end, Don pressed on, called them out and pressed them for a decision before we took the case to court.  The insurance company finally decided to do what was right and pay the case in full.  While our lives will be forever changed and our physical and emotional scars will always remain, we are forever grateful to Don and his entire team for the experience, compassion, and willingness to do whatever was needed to resolve our case.  I can not say enough good things about Dreyer Boyajian LLP, Attorneys at Law and would highly recommend them to anyone that needs their services.  Thank you again to the entire group for helping us get through this life altering event.
I highly recommend Dreyer Boyajian LLP. Attorney Joshua Friedman is very experienced, knowledgeable, diligent and responsive.
reviews.ownerResponse: Lois, thank you so much for your kind words.  It was a pleasure to work with you on this matter.  Feel free to reach out if we can be of assistance in the future.
Thank you for leaving us a review! It is our pleasure to help our clients get the quality representation they deserve.

Don became our point man and he fielded the abundance of questions and concerns that were a daily occurrence.   The firm handled EVERYTHING! reviews.text:
Categories I was most interested in when selecting an attorney for my husbands personal injury case were competent representation, communication, diligence, and fees. The Dreyer Boyajian LLP law firm was recommended to us and came through on all four requirements.

Mr Donald Boyajian was the attorney handling our case.  During our first meeting with Mr Boyajian it was apparent that he was certainly competent and gained our trust in his abilities to handle this case right from the start and in a timely manner.  The case was neither too big nor too small for him and he let us know that he would do all that he could do to have a winning outcome.  Mr Boyajian's legal knowledge, skill, thoroughness and preparedness were displayed throughout our meetings with him.

Communication in a timely matter was most important to my husband and also me.  Generally I expect a response within 24 hours as being reasonable after placing a call, sending a text or an emailing. Try this for a speedy reply.  Calls were generally answered by Mr Boyajian who was  available to us by phone, cell or office, text and was very timely when sending information via email. Mr Boyajian encouraged us to call or text whenever we had a question or needed reassurance and returned our calls immediately or within an hour or two and was generous with his time.  His strong, polite, pleasant and reassuring voice was most welcomed when we had questions or became antsy regarding the case.  Also a written contract was drawn up, thoroughly explained to us and signed by all parties.

Both my husband and I wanted an attorney who would be diligent and prompt in representing us  as we were somewhat aware that this could drag on for quite some time.  Don remained conscientious, caring and hardworking throughout the process and did all he could to bring this case to a favorable determination without going to trial and compensatory damages were highly favorable.

A fee was the last thing we thought about at the time but it is an important factor.  The fee was contingent upon the outcome of the case, and terms were adequately explained to us when we reviewed the contract.

Briefly, a few words about others in the firm with whom we had contact.  The firms receptionist Alicia was most pleasant, welcoming and helpful whenever we called or attended a meeting on site.  Don's assistant Colleen O'Connor was supportive, helpful and got information and documents to us promptly as did Joshua Friedman another attorney in the firm who was assisting Don with our case.

Thank you Don Boyajian and team.

Tom and Mary Kay
I hope you are both doing well. I was truly touched by your review. It has been an honor to win your trust . Remember, you can always call if you need me.

reviews.text: I met with Angela for an Estate Consultation following my mother’s passing. During a difficult time, Angela and her colleagues at Meier Law Firm went above and beyond with professionalism and advisement on how to properly handle all that was ahead. When I needed help answering some questions that emerged months after the consultation, Angela was most gracious with her time in responding and providing the help I needed. I would NEVER use this Law Firm.. and certainly not hire Angela! In the beginning she answered the phone, and I talked to her and I thought I was getting a free consultation. She never mentioned that she was charging me for talking to me or that there was a fee for the consultation, until the very VERY end, when I got charged for it. Then, throughout her doing just a simple trust, she wanted to charge me for looking into things,  which you should have known as an estate attorney.. hours of time! I always had to hunt her down and see what was going on with the estate. The BIGGEST thing was, we agreed on a set amount in the retainer, and I was to be notified monthly of any charges. I was not notified monthly, so I assumed we were at that same amount or below, again until the VERY end, when I found out we were almost DOUBLE that amount!! I was floored to say the least! VERY UNPROFESSIONAL, and didn't even keep their end of the agreement we signed in the retainer. I was VERY VERY disappointed to say the least!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Ms. Hatlee, thank you for sharing your feedback. It's our pleasure to be able to assist you, and we are certainly ready to provide you with counsel without judgment in the future should the need arise.

reviews.text: I used Meier Law Firm, PLLC for closings on both the sale of a current residence and purchase of a new home.  My attorney was extremely accommodating in coordinating the sale and purchase of these homes.  I would highly recommend their services to those involved in real estate and trust and estate issues.
reviews.ownerResponse: HI Joann, thank you for writing such a wonderful review for your attorney Angela Tylock and closing paralegal Leigh Fredenburg! We greatly appreciate your words and that you took the time to share your feedback. It's our pleasure to be able to assist you, and we are certainly ready to provide you with counsel without judgment in the future should the need arise. Enjoy your new home!

reviews.text: My husband and I needed to do our estate planning after we got married. It is not something you want to think about. Christina and Leigh were professional, efficient and personable. They even had a signature guide for people who have low vision. We would absolutely recommend them for you planning needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: Shawn, thank you so much for writing such a wonderful review. We greatly appreciate your words and that you took the time to share your feedback. It's our pleasure to be able to assist you both and to make the process as stress-free as possible. I'm glad that the signature guide was useful. We'd love an opportunity to provide you with counsel without judgment in the future should the need arise. Have a wonderful day.

reviews.text: The Meier Law Firm came recommended to me by a friend and we were not disappointed. During our planning meeting, Christina did a great job of thoroughly explaining all of our options. Angela put together our estate planning documents promptly, was very responsive to our changes, and made the signing process seamless for us. Thank you both for all of your help through what can be an overwhelming legal process!
reviews.ownerResponse: Ashley, thank you for writing such a wonderful review! We greatly appreciate your words and that you took the time to share your feedback. It's our pleasure to be able to assist you, and we are certainly ready to provide you with counsel without judgment in the future should the need arise. We wish you a happy, healthy and prosperous new year.

reviews.text: I worked with Angela for my Estate planning needs and was satisfied with the services provided. Angela explained the process thoroughly and in plain terms and everything went smoothly. All phone calls were returned promptly, and scheduled appointments taken on time. I would use this firm again as needed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Frank, thank you for writing such a wonderful review about Angela and our firm. We greatly appreciate your words and that you took the time to share your feedback. It's our pleasure to be able to assist you, and we are certainly ready to provide you with counsel without judgment in the future should the need arise.

reviews.text: Never responding to phone calls unprofessional
reviews.ownerResponse: Mary, thank you for sharing your feedback. Although you are not a client, I understand your frustration that I'm unable to speak with you. Feel free to have your attorney contact me at 518-313-7809. Sincerely, Christina Meier, Esq.

reviews.text: Not Impressed
reviews.ownerResponse: Kathleen, thank you for sharing your feedback, I am sorry that we were unable to assist you. Feel free to email or contact me at 518-313-7809 if you would like to discuss your concerns further. — Christina Meier, Esq.

reviews.text:
The Meier Law Firm is definitely the law firm you want to work with.  We just completed our estate planning and Christina did a wonderful job.  My husband and I had no idea where to begin and Christina explained it all.  She made the process easy to understand and answered all of our questions.
If you are looking to check this task off your list, go with the Meier Law Firm. You’ll be happy you did!

Update Dec 2021:
During the summe we had another reason to contact The Meier Law Firm.  Once again Christina and her colleagues came through for us. Pure professionalism from beginning to end. And always with a smile.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jenny, thank you for writing such a wonderful review! We greatly appreciate your words and that you took the time to share your feedback. We are grateful to have had the opportunity to assist you and your husband with your estate plan. Please contact us anytime you are looking for counsel without judgment. Be well and stay safe. Sincerely, Christina
